item.title: Editing
item.description: General Longing video intro (markdown format check, quotes, headers, footnotes, new lines within paragraph,): R202212 Testing formatting: Use http://dillinger.io General reference: MD Guide. italics - _italics_. Bold - **Bold**. Headings - ## Top heading ### Subheading #### Subsubheading conent Lists - item 1 - item 1.1 - item 2 - item 2.1 - item 2.2 - item 2.2.1 Spacing Paragraphs are separated by empty lines. Please remove empty spaces at the beginning of lines.
